zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Nanscoyk於大約1282年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Peter De Nanscoyk34歲，母親Pierse Nanskew23歲。她於1300年與Alan Bloyou在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1342年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Nanscoyk于大约1282年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Peter De Nanscoyk34岁，母亲Pierse Nanskew23岁。她于1300年与Alan Bloyou在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1342年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Nanscoyk was born about 1282, in Cornwall, England, her father, Peter De Nanscoyk, was 34 and her mother, Pierse Nanskew, was 23. She married Alan Bloyou in 1300, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1342, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Nanscoyk est née environ 1282, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Peter De Nanscoyk, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Pierse Nanskew, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Alan Bloyou en 1300, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1342, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Nanscoyk um 1282 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter De Nanscoyk 34 und ihre Mutter Pierse Nanskew 23. Sie hat 1300 in Cornwall, England Alan Bloyou geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1342 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Nanscoyk è nata il circa 1282 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Peter De Nanscoyk, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Pierse Nanskew, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Alan Bloyou nel 1300, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1342, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Nanscoykが約1282年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Peter De Nanscoykは34歳，母Pierse Nanskewは23歳であった。1300年にイギリスコルンワルでAlan Bloyouと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1342年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Nanscoyk(이)가 대략 1282년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter De Nanscoyk(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Pierse Nanskew(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 코른월에서 Alan Bloyou(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Nanscoyk nasceu aproximadamente 1282, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter De Nanscoyk, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Pierse Nanskew, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan Bloyou em 1300, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1342, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Nanscoyk родилась около 1282 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter De Nanscoyk было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Pierse Nanskew, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan Bloyou в 1300 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1342 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Alan Bloyou en 1300, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1342, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
